name: Vulcan Convection Oven
description: High-performance double-deck convection oven, perfect for high-volume baking and roasting.
fullDescription: Engineered for high-volume catering and restaurant service, the Vulcan Convection Oven delivers unmatched thermal consistency. Featuring a double-pane heat glass door and a high-velocity fan system, it ensures perfectly even browning.

name: Hobart 20qt Mixer
description: The industry standard for dough and batter preparation. Includes multiple attachments.
fullDescription: The Hobart 20qt Mixer is the gold standard for professional baking operations. With its powerful motor and three-speed transmission, it handles everything from light batters to heavy bread doughs with ease.
features: Includes flat beater, dough hook, and wire whip

fullDescription: The True Reach-In Refrigerator is built for demanding commercial environments. Its energy-efficient compressor maintains precise temperatures while the spacious interior accommodates large volumes of perishables.

name: 36" Gas Griddle

name: High-Temp Dishwasher
description: Undercounter sanitizing dishwasher with rapid wash cycles for busy kitchens.
fullDescription: The High-Temp Dishwasher sanitizes using hot water rather than chemicals, making it ideal for operations that require NSF certification compliance. Its compact undercounter design saves valuable kitchen space.

name: Heavy-Duty Stock Pot 50L
description: Large 50-litre stainless steel stock pot ideal for soups, stews and large batch cooking.
fullDescription: The Heavy-Duty 50L Stock Pot is built for serious catering operations. Its thick-gauge stainless steel construction ensures even heat distribution and durability through hundreds of uses.
features: Compatible with gas and electric stoves

name: Stock Pot 30L
description: Mid-size 30-litre stock pot perfect for sauces, broths and medium batch cooking.
fullDescription: The 30L Stock Pot strikes the perfect balance between capacity and manageability. Ideal for catering events of 50-100 guests, it heats evenly and is easy to handle even when full.

name: Stock Pot 15L
description: Compact 15-litre stock pot suitable for small events and side dishes.
fullDescription: The 15L Stock Pot is the go-to choice for smaller catering setups or side dish preparation. Its compact size makes it easy to store and transport while still offering generous capacity.

name: Non-Stick Frying Pan Set (3 sizes)
description: Set of 3 professional non-stick frying pans in 20cm, 28cm and 32cm sizes.
fullDescription: This professional non-stick frying pan set covers all your frying needs. The triple-layer non-stick coating ensures easy food release and quick cleanup, while the heat-resistant handles provide safe operation.
features: Suitable for all hob types including induction

name: Cast Iron Skillet 12"
description: Heavy-duty 12-inch cast iron skillet for searing, frying and oven finishing.
fullDescription: The 12-inch Cast Iron Skillet is a versatile workhorse that goes from stovetop to oven seamlessly. Its superior heat retention makes it perfect for searing meats and achieving restaurant-quality results.

name: Serving Spoon Set (10 pieces)
description: Set of 10 stainless steel serving spoons in various sizes for buffet and table service.
fullDescription: This comprehensive serving spoon set covers all serving needs from soups to rice to sauces. All spoons are made from food-grade stainless steel and are dishwasher safe for easy cleanup after events.

name: Ladle Set (5 pieces)
description: Professional 5-piece ladle set for soups, stews and sauces in different capacities.
fullDescription: This professional ladle set includes five different sizes ranging from 2oz to 12oz, covering every serving need from delicate sauces to hearty soups. The long handles keep hands safely away from heat.

name: Cooking Spoon Set (8 pieces)
description: 8-piece stainless steel cooking spoon set including slotted, solid and turner spoons.
fullDescription: This versatile 8-piece cooking spoon set includes everything a professional caterer needs: solid spoons, slotted spoons, a fish slice, a ladle, a skimmer, and more. All pieces are made from heavy-gauge stainless steel.
features: Includes solid, slotted and specialty spoons

name: Wok 36cm Carbon Steel
description: Professional 36cm carbon steel wok for stir-frying, deep frying and steaming.
fullDescription: The 36cm Carbon Steel Wok is essential for Asian-inspired catering menus. Its carbon steel construction heats rapidly and develops a natural non-stick patina with use, while the flat bottom ensures stability on all hob types.
features: Suitable for gas and electric hobs

name: Chafing Dish Set (6 pieces)
description: 6-piece stainless steel chafing dish set to keep food warm during buffet service.
fullDescription: This professional chafing dish set is essential for any buffet or event catering setup. Each dish holds heat effectively using water pans and fuel canisters, keeping food at safe serving temperatures for hours.
features: Includes water pans and food pans

name: Pressure Cooker 20L
description: Heavy-duty 20-litre pressure cooker for fast cooking of beans, meats and tough ingredients.
fullDescription: The 20L Pressure Cooker dramatically reduces cooking times for tough ingredients like beans, goat meat, and oxtail. Its heavy-duty construction and multiple safety valves make it reliable and safe for professional use.
features: Reduces cooking time by up to 70%

name: Baking Tray Set (6 pieces)
description: Set of 6 heavy-gauge aluminium baking trays in full, half and quarter sheet sizes.
fullDescription: This professional baking tray set covers all your baking needs. The heavy-gauge aluminium construction ensures even heat distribution and resistance to warping, while the set of 6 trays allows for high-volume production.
features: Full, half and quarter sheet sizes

name: Mixing Bowl Set (5 pieces)
description: 5-piece stainless steel mixing bowl set ranging from 1L to 8L for all prep needs.
fullDescription: This stainless steel mixing bowl set is an indispensable part of any professional kitchen setup. The five nested bowls range from 1L to 8L, covering everything from whisking eggs to mixing large batches of dough.
